questions: what to do if someone is choking
how to help a choking person
gola te khabar atke gele ki korbo
keu khabar khete giye choking korle
answers: If someone is choking, perform the Heimlich maneuver: stand behind them, make a fist above their navel, and give quick upward thrusts until the object comes out.
Choking hole pichu theke dui hat diye navel er upore thrust din. Bacchader jonno 5 back blows then 5 chest thrusts din. Jodi kaj na kore 999 call korun immediately.
For choking: encourage coughing first. If they can't breathe or cough, perform abdominal thrusts (Heimlich maneuver). For infants, give 5 back blows followed by 5 chest thrusts.
Golar moddhe khabar atke gele prothome cough korte bolun. Na perle pichu theke Heimlich maneuver korun — navel er upore fist diye upward thrust din. Emergency hole 999 call korun.
